market_pulse: Competitive activity peaks this weekend with Tiësto at LIV Beach, Cedric Gervais at OMNIA Dayclub, DJ Drama at Hakkasan, and multi-venue party passes driving aggregation.

weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Capitalize on Tiësto momentum Sunday morning. Counter OMNIA/Hakkasan with flash weekend promos Monday morning targeting Saturday night spillover.
